title: Bitcoin Narrative Cycles
description: Public narratives around Bitcoin shift across boom-bust phases, regulation headlines, and technology milestones. Learning to separate narrative heat from structural signal improves judgment.

resources.title: The Bitcoin Standard
resources.notes: Macro and monetary framing that situates this concept in Bitcoin's economic context.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech
resources.notes: Signal-rich updates that help anchor narratives in protocol reality.

resources.title: Original Whitepaper Announcement (Metzdowd)
resources.notes: Primary-source baseline for comparing early framing to later narratives.
